name: VALERO ENERGY CORP/TX
summary: Valero Energy Corporation is a Fortune 500 multinational manufacturer and marketer of petroleum-based and low-carbon liquid transportation fuels and petrochemical products. Based in San Antonio, Texas, Valero owns 15 petroleum refineries in the U.S., Canada, and U.K. with ~3.2 million BPD throughput capacity. It also operates 12 ethanol plants (~1.7 billion gallons/year capacity) and is a joint venture member in Diamond Green Diesel (DGD), producing renewable diesel and SAF (~1.2 billion gallons/year capacity).

products.name: Petroleum-based transportation fuels
products.description: Refined petroleum products including liquid transportation fuels produced at 15 refineries with ~3.2 million BPD capacity.

products.name: Renewable diesel
products.description: Low-carbon renewable diesel produced via DGD joint venture at two Gulf Coast plants with ~1.2 billion gallons/year capacity.

products.name: Ethanol
products.description: Low-carbon ethanol produced at 12 Mid-Continent U.S. plants with combined capacity of ~1.7 billion gallons per year.

products.name: Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF)
products.description: Neat sustainable aviation fuel produced as a low-carbon fuel product through DGD operations.

products.name: Petrochemical products
products.description: Petrochemical products manufactured and marketed primarily in the U.S., Canada, U.K., Ireland, and Latin America.

partnerships.description: Joint venture partner in Diamond Green Diesel Holdings LLC, producing low-carbon renewable diesel and SAF at two Gulf Coast plants.
